lines.speaker: Nia
lines.text: You look like a [man/lady] who knows how to dress up! How can I help ya?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a look at your stocks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you make any custom orders?

lines.speaker: Nia
lines.text: I do! I'm always keeping an eye out for interesting materials to work with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you make something for me?
